relationships.context: Webhook creates CRM profile from booking
Webhook adds contact to enrichment queue
Searches Gmail for prior contact history
Uses Aviato for contact data enrichment
Uses LinkedIn for professional context enrichment
Enrichment process outputs DD prep for meetings
